text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days before the Arima Kinen, Mayano Top
Gun asks me to come see her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Over here, Trainer! Quick! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Look, look! ☆ Look at this snowman! And look at
that tree over there! ♪
choice_data_list: You seem to be having fun.
You seem to be having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪ We're on a special date today, after all!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Tonight's the most sacred night of the year for
lovers... Haha. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In fact, it's not even the right day to begin with...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I know that!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, there are still a few days to go. And sure,
it's not even night, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I thought we should make a promise while we can!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Of course I wanna go on a date the night
of, but we've already got plans for that day.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Take my picture! ☆ With your phone!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Are you ready? Don't let this photo op go
to waste!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Do I look cute? Cherish that photo, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You'll see me make that same pose when the
special day arrives. That'll be my present to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I check the picture to see what she means...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the picture, Mayano Top Gun is proudly
waving into the distance with a smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! ☆ In other words, I'm going to win the
Arima!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Your present this year is getting to see me shine
brighter than ever!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So please spend the special day with me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...At the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing her declaration, I become a bit more
excited for this year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the picture, she's blowing a kiss toward the
camera.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I hope you're looking forward to the
winning concert after the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll be standing in the center, blowing a kiss for
you and you alone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Don't worry about it. ☆ I'll make sure no
one realizes it's just for you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... It feels like our relationship just became
more grown-up, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, it's fine! I'll do it stealthily when the stage
is dark!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Which means... you have to keep your eyes on me
the whole time throughout the Arima Kinen
concert! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Or would you rather I kiss you after I come off the
stage?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't mind that either! Ehehe! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I make her promise not to do anything of the sort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But still, at this year's Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know Mayano Top Gun will take first place and
stand center stage for me.
